pi_items.source: GitHub commit 43ef8ed (categorization activity ActivityInfo.qml) shows section: 'fun'; GCompris has 8 sections with discovery represented by penguin mascot, fun by dragon mascot (Konqi); multiple authoritative sources confirm categorization is in fun section
GitHub commit 43ef8ed shows activity title as 'Categorization'; verified across multiple GCompris documentation sources

Extensive search of GCompris source code and documentation found category_fruits.qml, category_vegetables.qml, and other category boards, but no category_animals.qml file found in public GCompris repositories. GitHub categorization activity resource directory listing not fully accessible.

privileged_info_summary: The GCompris Categorization activity is a drag-and-drop categorization game in the 'fun' section (not Discovery section as claimed). The activity allows users to categorize items into correct and incorrect groups. Available datasets include at least category_fruits.qml and category_vegetables.qml. An 'Animals' dataset/sub-activity for the categorization task could not be verified despite exhaustive search.
